description: An MCP server endpoint is reachable over plaintext HTTP, permitting interception/modification in transit.

fixture.setup: Client configured to reach a remote MCP server at http://mcp.vendor.example (no TLS).
fixture.observation: Streamable HTTP transport negotiated without TLS.

expected.signal: remote transport is not encrypted (http:// to a non-loopback host)

benignControl.setup: Client reaches the MCP server at https://mcp.vendor.example.

provenance: Synthetic; transport-layer gap (~0% coverage) per MCP-DPT (arXiv:2604.07551).
